## 🖥️ Environment

## 📌 Severity
Select severity level:

- [ ] Critical (System unusable / major data loss)
- [ ] High (Feature broken but site still works)
- [ ] Medium (Bug affects user experience)
- [ ] Low (Minor issue / cosmetic)

---

## 📝 Additional Notes
Any extra information, related issues, or possible solutions.
